---
title: "Call"
---

::: {.container-narrow}

## Call for contributions

The call for contributed talks and posters will be announced soon.

We expect contributions related to:

- Generative models for molecular design
- Target identification and mechanism discovery
- Perturbation-response modelling
- Cell-state prediction
- Multimodal and single-cell data integration
- Foundation models for biology
- Evaluation of biomedical generative systems
- Interpretability and biological grounding

:::
